gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND T1.height_cm > 200
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND T1.height_cm > 200
question: Among the superheroes with the super power of "Super Strength", how many of them have a height of over 200cm?
